title: types: ChatContact field updates
description:
## What
Spec changes (IMPROVEMENTS.md §2):
- presence: change from required ContactPresence to Option<ContactPresence>; absent = unknown
- ContactPresence enum: add Busy and Invisible variants (now: online, away, busy, invisible, offline; absent=unknown)
- Add statusText: Option<String> (server-set, mirrors contact's PresenceStatus.statusText)
- Add statusEmoji: Option<String> (server-set, mirrors contact's PresenceStatus.statusEmoji)

## Tests
Fixture tests/fixtures/types/chat_contact_full.json: contact with all fields including busy presence, statusText, statusEmoji
Fixture tests/fixtures/types/chat_contact_presence_absent.json: contact with absent presence field
Assert: absent presence field deserializes to None, not Unknown
Assert: Busy and Invisible serialize to 'busy' and 'invisible'
Assert: statusText/statusEmoji round-trip correctly
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
